mnemonics: Model-Visitor-Controller (MVC) - Model is the VIP (Very Important Part) that gets visited by the Controller and View
keyPoints: Model represents the application's data and business logic
View is responsible for displaying the data to the user
Controller handles user input and updates the Model
commonMistakes: Putting business logic in the View instead of the Model
Creating tight coupling between Model and View components
Making the Controller too large by handling both input processing and business rules
